creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
Hello,

context: stable/13

The COMMON ITEMS: section in /usr/src/UPDATING makes no mention of etcupdate. 

Please can we have the mentions/examples of mergemaster +switches changed to etcupdate (+equivalent switches) and also mention what to do if etcupdate has never been run on the system before (etcupdate extract)
